 Content-Type: text/plain; charset=UTF-8
 
 Hi,
 
 I've updated the original diff to work with pretest 23.1.94. There are some
 new files added in this release for which I've updated pkg-plist. And I also
 updated CONFLICTS option in Makefile to conflict with 'emacs-23.*'. Correct me
 if I'm wrong.
 
 And some of the patches mentioned in the previous version are already in the
 upstream, so I've removed them from the files.
 
 Thats all. Attached are the updated diffs for editors/emacs-devel and
 Mk/bsd.emacs.mk.
 
 HTH
 -- 
 Ashish SHUKLA
 
 India will always have just enough bandwidth so we can check email. -
 Gautam Renjen
 
 P.S. I'm out-of-station so this mail is unsigned.
